articles.title: ENTERPRISE-GRADE OR _AND_ ENTERPRISING SOLUTIONS
articles.summary: With Marqeta, launch payments experiences without choosing between innovation and scale. Marqeta [4] combines the scale and reliability of proven payments infrastructure with the flexibility and innovation of a modern platform—so you can move faster, reduce risk, and grow with confidence.

articles.title: MY BEEF WITH AI CREDIT PRICING
articles.summary: Credits confuse customers and undermine trust because costs are unpredictable and inconsistent across companies. When LLM costs fall, the winners will be the companies that return to clear, transparent pricing.

articles.title: MARKETPLACES IN THE AGE OF AI
articles.summary: AI is reviving failed marketplace categories by fixing unit economics and removing operational bottlenecks. Automating matching and service delivery makes these markets profitable and creates better experiences for both buyers and suppliers.

articles.title: ALL YOU CAN DO IS PLAY THE GAME
articles.summary: “I don't know” can mean everything from apathy to insight. In a world shaped by unpredictable AI breakthroughs, the only reliable path forward is to build and learn as you go.

articles.title: OVERTHINKER!
articles.summary: Oversimplification ignores reality, but complexity without action does not help anyone. Progress comes from acting, prototyping, and engaging while staying open to what the system reveals.

articles.title: METRONOME LAUNCH WEEK: EMBED BILLING DIRECTLY IN YOUR PRODUCT EXPERIENCE
articles.summary: Customers want to know what things cost ahead of time - not when invoices land. Increase transparency and build trust with Metronome's new cost preview API [9] - showing estimates before users take action. Also announced: an embeddable billing console for self-service invoice management + proactive alerts at critical contract moments. Read more.

articles.title: HOW TO USE AI AGENTS FOR MARKETING
articles.summary: AI agents only work when they sit inside real workflows and are powered by trusted data. Used this way, they can massively improve enrichment, personalization, and conversion.

articles.title: I PUT THE 5 BEST AI PROTOTYPING TOOLS TO THE TEST
articles.summary: AI prototyping turns PMs into rapid experimenters who can validate ideas fast and reduce wasted work. Mastering the workflow and the tools is quickly becoming a core competitive skill for 2025.

articles.title: WHAT AI AUTOMATES
articles.summary: AI excels at tasks that can be verified through repeatable feedback loops, which explains its rapid progress on structured problems and slower gains on creative or contextual ones.

articles.title: GOT PRODUCT QUESTIONS? GET ANSWERS FROM YOUR PRODUCTION DATABASE, WITH PLAIN ENGLISH
articles.summary: Quadratic gives PMs fast, trustworthy insights with direct database access, AI-generated SQL, and live dashboards that stay in sync as your product evolves – all within a familiar spreadsheet interface.

articles.title: ACT TO LEARN
articles.summary: When you are uncertain, take action anyway, because even the wrong move creates the information you need to make the right one next.

articles.title: SHIP FAST OR FALL BEHIND
articles.summary: In consumer software, rapid shipping matters most because constant releases keep you close to users, help you learn what they actually want, and show you where to double down.
